H4: Search ================================================== AFTER OPTIMIZED STRUCTURE ================================================== H1: Retractable Banner Stands with 78" x 33" Custom Banners for Trade Shows & Events H2: Professional Telescoping Retractor Design with Quick-Change Graphics H2: Custom Retractable Banner Design for Professional Display H2: Telescoping Retractor Banner Material for Professional Trade Show Use H2: Production Times for Custom Retractable Banner Printing H2: Payment & Ordering Options for Retractable Banner Stands H2: Shipping Guidelines for Telescoping Retractor Delivery H2: Professional Uses for Telescoping Retractor Banner Displays H2: Retractable Banner Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing H2: Order Custom Telescoping Retractor Banners for Your Next Event H2: Frequently Asked Questions About Telescoping Retractor Banners ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW # Retractable Banner Stands with 78" x 33" Custom Banners for Trade Shows & Events ## Professional Telescoping Retractor Design with Quick-Change Graphics PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material Choice for Professional Display: 13 oz Vinyl for Banner Retractors 14 oz No Curl Vinyl for Banner Retractors Banner Soft Fabric for Banner Retractors Product Configuration: Retractable Banner Stand with Hardware Size Options (H x W): 78" x 33" PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Retractable Banner Design for Professional Display

The Superb Telescoping Retractor features a sleek design that delivers the perfect combination of professional appearance and functional versatility. The specially engineered telescoping pole and roller system extends from within its compact base, allowing you to display custom banners from 78" to 33" high for various venue requirements.

This innovative design enables quick and easy graphic changes, making it ideal for businesses that need to update messaging frequently for different trade shows, events, or seasonal promotions. The professional-grade construction ensures reliable performance in high-traffic environments.

Each retractable banner stand includes durable vinyl or fabric banner material printed with your custom design, creating an eye-catching display that attracts customers and communicates your brand message effectively.

Perfect for trade show booths, retail environments, lobby displays, presentations, and any professional setting where you need portable, high-impact visual communication.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Telescoping Retractor Banner Material for Professional Trade Show Use

Your telescoping retractor includes both the professional hardware system and a custom 78" x 33" banner printed on your choice of premium materials.

Professional Material Options:

13 oz Vinyl: Our most versatile banner material, engineered for both indoor and outdoor professional use. Provides excellent durability for frequent setup and takedown at trade shows and events.

14 oz No Curl Vinyl: Premium quality material featuring high-resolution print capability with a smooth matte finish that reduces glare under exhibition lighting.

Banner Soft Fabric: Professional matte finish material that delivers vibrant colors and eliminates wrinkles, perfect for high-end trade show presentations.

Please note: Exact banner dimensions may vary slightly due to the temperature-sensitive nature of vinyl materials during printing and finishing processes. Our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot. For precision-critical applications, please discuss your specific requirements with our customer service team.

Request a free sample packet of materials to evaluate quality and finish options.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Telescoping Retractor Hardware Features for Professional Display

The Superb Telescoping Retractor system includes precision-engineered components designed for reliable professional use:

Hardware Specifications:

  • Telescoping Pole System: Adjustable height from 33" to 78" to accommodate various venue requirements
  • Spring-Loaded Base: Compact design with internal roller mechanism for smooth banner extension
  • Quick-Change Graphics: Tool-free banner replacement system for easy updates
  • Portable Design: Lightweight construction for easy transport between events
  • Stable Base: Wide footprint ensures stability in high-traffic environments
  • Professional Finish: Sleek appearance complements any professional setting

The telescoping mechanism allows you to customize display height based on ceiling restrictions, table heights, or visual impact requirements at different venues.

All hardware components are designed for repeated use, making this system ideal for businesses that participate in multiple trade shows or frequently update their marketing displays.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production Times for Custom Retractable Banner Printing

We provide flexible production scheduling to meet your event deadlines. Choose from multiple turnaround options to ensure your retractable banner arrives when you need it:

1 Business Day Priority Production

Urgent deadline approaching? Our priority production gets your custom retractable banner completed in just one business day.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency same-day rushes available in select cases - contact customer service
  • Production time begins once file upload is complete and approved

2 Business Day Express Production

Fast turnaround for upcoming trade shows and events with slightly more flexible timing.

3 Business Day Standard Production

Our most popular production option - fast enough for most events while maintaining exceptional quality.

5 Business Day Saver Production

Cost-effective option when you have advance planning time for your event or trade show.

Important Notes:

  • Production time is separate from shipping time to your location
  • Turnaround begins when artwork files are uploaded and approved
  • Proof requests will pause production until your approval is received
  • Contact customer service for emergency rush options
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment & Ordering Options for Retractable Banner Stands

We accept multiple payment methods to make ordering your custom retractable banner stand convenient and secure:

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover
  • Check Payments: Business checks accepted - must be received before production begins
  • Secure Processing: Your card is only charged after you approve your order

Payment Timing: All retractable banner orders must be paid in full before production begins. This ensures we can meet your specified deadline without delays.

Order Approval Process: We will not charge your payment method until you have reviewed and approved your order details, including artwork, specifications, and production timeline.

For check payments, please review our check order process to understand timing requirements for your event deadline.

Questions about payment options or need to discuss special billing arrangements? Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Telescoping Retractor Delivery

Your retractable banner stand will be carefully packaged and shipped to arrive in perfect condition for your event or trade show.

Available Shipping Methods:

  • Economy Shipping: 5-10 business days
  • Standard Shipping: 3-5 business days
  • Three Day Express: 3 business days
  • Two Day Express: 2 business days
  • Overnight Express: 1 business day

Important Shipping Information:

  • Tracking numbers provided once your package ships
  • Shipping costs determined by package weight and destination
  • Additional charges apply to oversized orders
  • International shipping available through USPS and UPS (customer provides labels and customs documentation)

Delivery Protection:

If your retractable banner stand is damaged during shipping, return the damaged items and we'll send a replacement. Lost packages are replaced after the shipping carrier confirms loss (typically 7-10 business days after scheduled delivery).

Important: Shipping carrier terms apply for delays or lost packages once items leave our facility. Plan accordingly for your event dates.

Questions about shipping to your location or special delivery requirements? Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your order.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Uses for Telescoping Retractor Banner Displays

The telescoping retractor banner system is designed for versatile professional applications where you need portable, high-impact visual communication:

Trade Show & Exhibition Applications:

  • Booth Displays: Create eye-catching backdrops that adjust to different booth heights
  • Product Announcements: Easily swap graphics for new product launches
  • Company Branding: Professional presentation that reinforces brand identity
  • Directional Signage: Guide visitors to your booth or specific areas

Business & Retail Environments:

  • Lobby Displays: Welcome visitors with professional messaging
  • Promotional Campaigns: Quick graphic changes for seasonal promotions
  • Store Events: Announce sales, special events, or new offerings
  • Conference Rooms: Professional presentations and company messaging

Event & Presentation Uses:

  • Speaking Events: Professional backdrop for presentations
  • Corporate Events: Branded displays for company functions
  • Job Fairs: Attract candidates with compelling employer branding
  • Grand Openings: Create excitement with professional announcements

The adjustable height feature makes this banner stand ideal for venues with varying ceiling heights or when you need to accommodate different display requirements at the same event.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Retractable Banner Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

To ensure your telescoping retractor banner prints with exceptional quality, please follow these artwork specifications:

Recommended File Formats:

  • Vector Files: .EPS files with fonts converted to outlines (best quality)
  • High-Resolution PDFs: 300 DPI minimum for crisp text and graphics
  • High-Resolution Images: .JPG or .TIFF files at 300 DPI or higher

Artwork Specifications for 78" x 33" Banners:

  • Dimensions: 78" height x 33" width plus bleed area
  • Resolution: 300 DPI for optimal print quality
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • File Size: Maximum 60 MB for standard uploads

Design Considerations:

  • Safe Areas: Keep important text and graphics away from edges
  • Font Guidelines: Convert fonts to outlines or provide font files
  • Image Quality: Use high-resolution images to avoid pixelation
  • Color Matching: Consider our Color Match Proof System for critical color requirements

Artwork Support:

Unsure about your file quality or specifications? Our professional graphic designers can review your artwork and provide recommendations to ensure optimal printing results.

Large Files: For files larger than 60 MB, please call for upload instructions to ensure fastest processing.

Professional Design Service: Need artwork created from scratch? Our design team can create professional graphics based on your specifications and brand guidelines.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Telescoping Retractor Banners for Your Next Event

Ready to create a professional display that will make your brand stand out at trade shows, business events, and retail environments? The Superb Telescoping Retractor system combines innovative design with reliable performance to deliver maximum visual impact.

Why Choose Our Telescoping Retractor System:

  • Professional Customer Service: 100% in-house support team of graphic design professionals ready to help
  • Flexible Production: Choose 1, 2, 3, or 5-day turnaround to meet your event deadline
  • Premium Materials: High-quality vinyl and fabric options printed with the latest technology
  • Live Order Tracking: Monitor your order progress with our proprietary tracking system

Whether you're preparing for an upcoming trade show, updating your retail displays, or need professional signage for corporate events, our telescoping retractor banner system provides the flexibility and quality you need.

The quick-change graphics feature makes this system perfect for businesses that participate in multiple events or frequently update their messaging. Simply order replacement banners when you need new graphics - the hardware system is built to last.

Get Started: Upload your artwork, choose your material and production time, and we'll handle the rest. Your professional telescoping retractor banner will arrive ready to set up and make an impact at your next event.

Questions about specifications, artwork requirements, or which material works best for your application? Our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 is ready to help you create the perfect display solution.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Telescoping Retractor Banners

How tall can the telescoping retractor extend?

The Superb Telescoping Retractor adjusts from 33" to 78" in height, allowing you to customize the display based on your venue requirements, ceiling height, or visual impact needs.

How easy is it to change the banner graphics?

The system features a tool-free graphic change design. You can quickly swap out banners without any special tools or technical expertise, making it perfect for businesses that update messaging frequently.

What material works best for trade show environments?

For trade shows, we recommend either the 14 oz No Curl Vinyl for its smooth matte finish that reduces glare under exhibition lighting, or Banner Soft Fabric for its wrinkle-free appearance and vibrant color reproduction.

Can I order just replacement banners for existing hardware?

Yes, you can order replacement banners separately if you already have the telescoping retractor hardware. This makes it cost-effective to update your graphics for different events or campaigns.

How portable is the telescoping retractor system?

The system is designed for easy transport between events. The compact base and lightweight construction make it simple for one person to carry and set up at different venues.

What's the maximum file size for artwork uploads?

Standard uploads can be up to 60 MB. For larger files, please call our customer service team for special upload instructions to ensure the fastest processing.

Do you offer rush production for last-minute events?

Yes, we offer 1-business-day priority production for urgent deadlines. Emergency same-day rushes may be available in select cases - contact our customer service team to discuss your specific timeline.

Can the retractor be used outdoors?

The banner materials are suitable for outdoor use, but the telescoping retractor system is primarily designed for indoor professional environments like trade shows, retail spaces, and corporate events.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
